compiled_state.title: SDET minor test-quality cluster (skip->xfail, collision gate, CLI --output guard, leaf-writes naming)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What (SDET review MINORs)
- test_store_concurrency.py:27 resolves on-PATH rebar at import and SKIPS SILENTLY if it lacks rebar._store (false green under a stale install); also inherits ambient REBAR_*. Prefer xfail over skip; scrub REBAR_*.
- test_id_collision.py:25 _N=2000 over a 16-hex space ~never collides — near-tautology; raise N or reframe as a format/determinism check.
- CLI --output schema coverage (test_schema_coverage.py:48-61) is help-text-substring-driven + only checks registry membership — no mechanical "every CLI --output advertiser validates REAL output" guard equivalent to the MCP one. Add it.
- test_leaf_writes_parity.py: name is historical; confirm the lone bash test (L32) does not silently fall back to python (which would make its count==2 assert vacuous); else relabel.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] store-concurrency uses xfail (not silent skip) + scrubs REBAR_* env
- [ ] id-collision gate strengthened (higher N or reframed as format/determinism)
- [ ] a mechanical CLI --output-validates-real-output guard added (MCP-parity)
- [ ] leaf-writes lone-bash test verified non-vacuous or relabeled

comments.body: Done. (1) test_store_concurrency.py: _clean_env() scrubs all REBAR_* + adds REBAR_NO_SYNC; probe now drives a real 'rebar init' in a throwaway repo (detects stale installs); skipif->xfail(strict=False) so a stale install is VISIBLE (xfail/xpass) not a silent green skip. (2) test_id_collision.py: added format/determinism contract test (16-hex, uuid4 slice); raised collision-sweep N 2000->200000; alias-determinism kept at 2000. (3) test_schema_coverage.py: added mechanical CLI --output guard mirroring the MCP one - CLI_OUTPUT_DRIVERS drives every advertiser's REAL --output json and jsonschema-validates vs the registered schema, plus a completeness guard (bridge-status documented EXEMPT_BRIDGE); both temp-break verified red. (4) test_leaf_writes_parity.py: the bash-vs-python test was vacuous (REBAR_LEAF_WRITES no longer read by runtime; bash leaf retired 2026-06-11) - replaced with test_library_comment_repeated_same_body_both_land asserting the real python-path append-only invariant. ruff clean; order-independent.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
